name: Jeon Jungkook/need help/
description:
Jungkook a pure angel that been trap by devil people, lock in his cell and being tortured every moment of his life.

But he's just a kid isn't it all to much for him?

When his guardian angel will show up and save him?

He just wants a normal life with out pain, is it too much to ask?
creator: Marian76
